root.m_Talk_ENG: Typical Aries, always so uptight. You do know theatrics matter, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Typical Aries, always so uptight. You do know theatrics matter, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Typical Aries, always so uptight. You do know theatrics matter, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bold moves are the key to showmanship. Especially during the highlights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Highlights, my foot! I'll make sure to play that at your funeral!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Highlights, my foot! I'll make sure to play that at your funeral!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Highlights, my foot! I'll make sure to play that at your funeral!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We made it in time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We made it in time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We made it in time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This time... I protected her for real.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This time... I protected her for real.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This time... I protected her for real.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it... Is it really you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it... Is it really you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it... Is it really you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I, Esterosa de Chevalier, Knight of Virgo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As of this moment, I officially return to the Zodiac Knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As of this moment, I officially return to the Zodiac Knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As of this moment, I officially return to the Zodiac Knights.
